meta.description: Phase 2 parameter recommendation based on Phase 1 analysis

recommendations.focus_seeds: Focus on top-performing seeds that consistently produce nu < -0.3
recommendations.avoid_high_rmin: rmin > 6.0 rarely produces auxetic behavior — cap the upper bound
recommendations.volfrac_strategy: Volfrac in [0.25, 0.64] gives best trade-off between auxeticity and material usage
recommendations.rotation: Fixed to 0 for Phase 2 to reduce parameter space (rotation shows limited benefit)
recommendations.mu: Keep mu = 0.2 as it demonstrated good balance in Phase 1
